titleStmt.title: SII 26.294: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 294. (A.R. No. 279 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is incomplete at the end. It seems to be a copy of No. 289 above. However the 10th year in which the failure of crops is stated in No. 289 to have occurred is not clear in the present record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kulottuṅkacoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu muppatteḻāva
tu kaḷattūrkkoṭṭattuc ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭut tirukkaccūrāna nittavino
tanallūrom yāṇṭu muppatteḻāvatu varuṣaminaṟiye Eṅkaḷūri
l ceyta payir cāvipoy Iṟaivisana mikukaiyil Āyanallūr kiḻa
vaṉ kuppaicoṟuṭaiyārāna Oymānāṭṭu veḷāṉ tiruvālak
koyiluṭaiya mahādevarkku man=tiraponakattukkum kaṟia
murtu nālukkum neyyamurtukkum tayiramurtukkum Aṭaikkā
yamurtukkum Arici kuṟuṇikkum Ūri Eṅkālāl viṭṭu varukiṟa
nellut tūṇikkum vaittuvarukiṟa sandhiviḷakkup patinoṉ
ṟukkum Uṭalāka Eṅkaḷūrppiṭākai kiḻkkāraṇai kū
ṇūrār Ellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟ ciṟṟamaṇūrā E
llaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟ pāḻikkiṇaṟṟukku mel vi
ḷimpukku kiḻakkum peramaṇūr Ellaikku teṟkum Iṉnāṉku E
llaikku naṭuvupaṭṭanilam kāṭuveṭṭit tāṉ veṇṭiṉa
payir ceyvittuk koḷḷakkaṭavatāka Ivan pakkal nāṅkaḷ ko
ṇṭa kācu patiṉaiñcu Ikkācu patiṉaiñcukkum poliyūṭṭāka
k kuṭuttom Iṉnilattukku Iṟai Ivaṉaṟuvatu Epper
ppaṭṭatu Iṟuttu Iṉ nimanIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.294 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
